name: Atrium 3D LOOP-05 Regression Proof
description: Verify Atrium 3D branding, the renamed launch test id, strict testMode gating, and real debug evidence for canvas and Study Mode state after the LOOP-05 fixes deploy.

planSteps.description: Verify the landing page uses Atrium 3D branding, has no visible old Saray product branding, and shows a launch button with data-testid=open-atrium-button.
Click the launch button with data-testid=open-atrium-button.
Verify the app opens at /app without a TestMode Debug/Status Panel or test helper controls because testMode=true is not present.
Click the launch button with data-testid=open-atrium-button.
Verify the app opens at /app with testMode=true preserved in the URL and the TestMode Debug/Status Panel is present.
Verify data-testid=debug-app-loaded is true, data-testid=debug-route reports /app, a real canvas element exists, and data-testid=debug-canvas-mounted is true only alongside that real canvas.
Verify data-testid=debug-study-mode-active is false before a study session starts and no runtime error is shown.
Record the current value of data-testid=debug-notes-count.
Click the hidden test helper button with data-testid=test-add-note-helper.
Verify data-testid=debug-notes-count increases by exactly one, proving the debug panel is reporting real application state.
